    {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "Total_Profit = np.sum(df[\"Total Profit\"])\n",
        "print(Total_Profit)"
      ],
      "metadata": {

        "colab": {

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# The total revenue and total profit were calculated to evaluate overall business performance. These values represent the complete financial outcome of all sales transactions in the dataset."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "DEptmGL9op9Q"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Calculating average revenue.\n",
        "avg_revenue = df[\"Total Revenue\"].mean()\n",
        "avg_profit = df[\"Total Profit\"].mean()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Average Revenue:\", avg_revenue)\n",
        "print(\"Average Profit:\", avg_profit)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "Sr40puMFpvsL",
        "outputId": "15306e6f-f751-4421-b955-962b47f354f4"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Average Revenue: 1327321.84033\n",
            "Average Profit: 391202.61155999993\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# The average revenue and average profit provide insight into the typical earning per order. This helps in understanding overall profitability trends and performance consistency."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Mx8wha3-qmpH"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "total_orders = df[\"Order ID\"].count()\n",
        "print(\"Total Order:\", total_orders)"
      ],
      "metadata": {

        "# The total number of orders confirms that the dataset consists of 1000 completed sales transactions."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "fAAsxvqfrdWO"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Calculating Delivery time.\n",
        "delivery_date = (df[\"Ship Date\"]-df[\"Order Date\"]).dt.days\n",
        "print(\"Delivery Date:\", delivery_date)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "8yTq8kySrtvs",
        "outputId": "c43ce645-7d9f-4ccb-b179-2d4b0b10410b"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Delivery Date: 0      13\n",
            "1      31\n",
            "2      39\n",
            "3      32\n",
            "4      15\n",
            "       ..\n",
            "995     7\n",
            "996    37\n",
            "997    47\n",
            "998    20\n",
            "999    28\n",
            "Length: 1000, dtype: int64\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "avg_delivery_date = delivery_date.mean()\n",
        "print(\"Average Delivery Date:\", avg_delivery_date)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "97L0Xu-8skgF",
        "outputId": "411c506a-974a-4751-f3cf-d478d6fd67c9"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Average Delivery Date: 25.001\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# Delivery days were calculated by subtracting Order Date from Ship Date. The average delivery time shows how efficiently the company processes and ships orders."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Xe2de7Qyzt6C"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Group by\n",
        "# Revenue by Region.\n",
        "revenue_by_region = df.groupby(\"Region\")[\"Total Revenue\"].sum()\n",
        "print(revenue_by_region )"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "FKciMuxS0F9O",
        "outputId": "5f625640-a4f6-4b20-d8e5-8835c5082592"

          "name": "stdout",

      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Group by\n",
        "#Profit by Item.\n",
        "profit_by_item = df.groupby(\"Item Type\")[\"Total Profit\"].sum()\n",
        "print(profit_by_item)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

        "id": "QwCC79aq0x9L",

            "Cosmetics          74081138.64\n",
            "Fruits               855851.25\n",

    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# Group by analysis helped identify which regions and item types contribute the most to revenue and profit."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "V4NgNNHr1OBx"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Calculating highest revenue orders Items.\n",
        "highest_revenue_orders = df.nlargest(5, \"Total Revenue\")\n",
        "print(highest_revenue_orders[[\"Item Type\",\"Total Revenue\"]])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },

        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Calculating smallest revenue orders items.\n",
        "smallest_revenue_orders = df.nsmallest(5, \"Total Revenue\")\n",
        "print(smallest_revenue_orders[[\"Item Type\",\"Total Revenue\"]])"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# The n-largest and n-smallest analysis identified the highest and lowest performing orders. This helps in understanding extreme performance cases and potential improvement areas."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "tjcTHwF33Bzz"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Calculating year from order date\n",

        "print(year)"

          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Calculating year by revenue.\n",

        "colab": {

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "# A new Year column was extracted from the Order Date and the data was grouped year wise to calculate total revenue."

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Graphs\n",
        "# Revenue by Region.\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "plt.bar(revenue_by_region.index, revenue_by_region.values,\n",
        "        color=[\"Purple\",\"Orange\",\"Pink\",\"Green\",\"Grey\",\"Skyblue\",\"Blue\"],\n",
        "        edgecolor=\"black\",\n",
        "        width=0.5)\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Region\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Total Revenue\")\n",
        "plt.title(\"Total Revenue by Region\")\n",
        "plt.xticks(rotation=45,ha=\"right\")\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.grid(axis=\"y\",linestyle=\"--\", alpha=0.7)\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 406
